message:
fix(engine): replace panicking unwraps with fallible alternatives in 4 modules

- extension_lifecycle_manager: .unwrap() → .expect() with descriptive
  message on the post-guard extension record lookup
- scalar_replacement_engine: .expect() → .unwrap_or_default() on deopt
  trigger serialization so a serialization failure yields an empty
  string instead of a panic (the hash input remains unique via other
  fields)
- seqlock_candidate_inventory: .expect() → filter_map for retry budget
  policy lookup (gracefully skips candidates without a policy row
  instead of panicking), and two .expect() → .unwrap_or_default() on
  JSON serialization of env.json and repro.lock bundle artifacts
- stdlib_workload_verification: minor cleanup

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
